name: @chbrain/khai-engine-socialization
description: khai engine content, the socialization domain: socialization as process, how the objective social world -- built by prior generations and handed to a newcomer ready-made -- is internalized until it reads as reality itself, and how that formation continues past childhood into institutional sub-worlds.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Socialization as process: how the objective social world -- built by prior generations and handed to a newcomer ready-made -- is internalized until it is no longer one possible order among others but reality itself, and how that formation continues past childhood into institutional sub-worlds.

card.wire: Attaches at Process. The root (process_socialization.md) declares socialization as the process by which the objective social world -- built before the persona arrived -- becomes the persona's own taken-for-granted reality.
card.issue: The formation, read three ways beneath the root. One process names the mechanism itself (internalization: the objective order retrojected into the persona's own consciousness as simply the way things are); one position names the stance it leaves the persona holding (socialized: a member who takes the given world for granted, not a student rehearsing it); one process names how the formation continues past childhood (secondary: later induction into institutional sub-worlds and role-specific knowledge the primary world did not anticipate).
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. The link: each persona links, under Projection, the specific reading it runs in the scene.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and each persona links a real socialization reading. Whether the reading is true to the persona's formation is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. Then give the persona its read under Projection, linking the specific expression -- the internalization it underwent, the socialized stance it holds, or the secondary induction it is undergoing. Read it in what the persona treats as simply obvious, never as a narrated awareness of the construction.
